category.description: Failure category that drives retry policy. Superset of ``classify_failure``'s ``CATEGORIES`` (which never emits ``preempted`` directly — that's a scheduler-level state).
category.title: Category

overrides.description: Resource overrides for retry (mem, walltime, gpus, ...).
overrides.title: Overrides

request_id.description: Optional dedupe key. When omitted, hpc-agent derives a deterministic id from (sorted failed_task_ids, category, sorted overrides). A second resubmit with the same request_id returns the existing record without incrementing retry counters.
request_id.title: Request Id

submit_to_cluster.description: When true, hpc-agent composes resubmit_plan + backend.submit_array to actually re-issue the failed tasks. When false (legacy default), the operation is journal-only. Requires script, backend, and job_name to be set when true.
submit_to_cluster.title: Submit To Cluster

script.description: Path on the cluster to the submission script. Required when submit_to_cluster is true; ignored otherwise.
script.title: Script

backend.description: Scheduler backend kind. Required when submit_to_cluster is true; ignored otherwise.
backend.title: Backend

job_name.description: Job name for the resubmitted batches. Required when submit_to_cluster is true; ignored otherwise.
job_name.title: Job Name

job_env.description: Environment variables to forward to each resubmitted batch. Same shape submit-flow accepts. Ignored unless submit_to_cluster is true.
job_env.title: Job Env
